use tokio::sync::Mutex;

async fn process_request(state: &Mutex<SharedState>, data: Vec<u8>) -> Response {
    let mut guard = state.lock().await;
    guard.request_count += 1;
    let count = guard.request_count;
    drop(guard);
    let result = validate_and_transform(&data).await;
    let mut guard = state.lock().await;
    guard.last_result = Some(result.clone());
    Response { count, body: result }
}

async fn validate_and_transform(_data: &[u8]) -> String { todo!() }

struct SharedState {
    request_count: u64,
    last_result: Option<String>,
}

struct Response {
    count: u64,
    body: String,
}
